response:
# Movie Review

Sure! I can help with a movie review. Here are a few options:

---

## What would you like?

**1. Write a review** - Tell me the movie title and I'll write a review for you

**2. Help you write your own** - I can guide you through the structure

**3. Review template** - A ready-to-use format

---

## Quick Review Template:

> **🎬 Movie Title** *(Year)*
> **⭐ Rating:** /10
>
> **📖 Plot Summary:**
> *(Brief, spoiler-free overview)*
>
> **👍 What Worked:**
> - Acting
> - Direction
> - Story
>
> **👎 What Didn't Work:**
> - Pacing issues
> - Plot holes
>
> **🎯 Final Verdict:**
> *(Who should watch it?)*

---

Just tell me:
- 🎥 **Which movie** you want reviewed
- 📝 **What kind of help** you need

I'm ready to help! 🍿
